creator: jmg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-amd64->jmg

Your response did not include the requested information which includes 
the version of FreeBSD you are using.  From your response, it sounds 
like you are running Windows.  If that is the case, please contact 
Microsoft or the vendor of your HDD for support.  We can only support 
you if you are running FreeBSD.
